CVE-2024-35434.title: Irontec Sngrep v1.8.1 was discovered to contain a heap buffer ove ...
CVE-2024-35434.description: Irontec Sngrep v1.8.1 was discovered to contain a heap buffer overflow via the function rtp_check_packet at /sngrep/src/rtp.c. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted SIP packet.
